/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/engine/window/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/engine/math/math.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/engine/game_object/game_object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/engine/render_system/shaders/program.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/engine/render_system/camera/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/engine/render_system/resource_management/resource_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/engine/render_system/mesh/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/engine/render_system/texture/texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/engine/render_system/texture/texture_hdri.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/engine/render_system/material/material.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/engine/render_system/render.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/engine/input_system/inputs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/engine/input_system/input_map_conversion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/engine/audio_system/audio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/engine/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/game/opening_scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/deps/imgui/misc/cpp/imgui_stdlib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/deps/imgui/misc/freetype/imgui_freetype.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/deps/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/deps/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/deps/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/deps/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/deps/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/deps/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/deps/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/deps/glad/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/deps/stbi/stbi_implmentation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o main  -lglfw -lGL -lassimp -lfreetype -lopenal
